subject: Your churn rate is hiding in plain sight — here's what I found
body:
Hi [Name],

Saw your post about hitting 500 customers — congrats on the milestone.

At that stage, most SaaS founders discover that churn quietly outpaces new MRR. The usual culprit: customers who never reach their 'aha moment' in the first 14 days.

[Product] identifies at-risk users before they cancel and triggers the right intervention automatically. One client reduced churn by 22% in 60 days without changing the product.

Worth a 20-minute call this week?
why_it_works: milestone icebreaker + specific growth-stage pain + measurable result + simple CTA
